case_title: JEKYLL APARTMENTS LLC VS. EL MOSTAFA ZRIKI ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEKYLL APARTMENTS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZRIKI, EL MOSTAFA AKA ZRIKI MUSTAFA AKA ZRIKI MOSSAFA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 138 HYDE STREET #07, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94102, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMESIS INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $474.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ZRIKI, EL MOSTAFA AKA ZRIKI MUSTAFA AKA ZRIKI MOSSAFA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEKYLL APARTMENTS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZRIKI, EL MOSTAFA AKA ZRIKI MUSTAFA AKA ZRIKI MOSSAFA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $1,099.23 RENT, $474.50 COSTS, $1,197.84 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,771.57, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEKYLL APARTMENTS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ZRIKI, EL MOSTAFA AKA ZRIKI MUSTAFA AKA ZRIKI MOSSAFA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
